# The files Vite is expected to produce
set(UC_NAMES "wapp.html" "wapp.css" "wapp.js" "wapp.js.map")
set(GZ_NAMES "wapp.html.gz" "wapp.css.gz" "wapp.js.gz" "wapp.js.map.gz")
set(BR_NAMES "wapp.html.br" "wapp.css.br" "wapp.js.br" "wapp.js.map.br")

# Full paths for Vite's output files
set(GZBR_PATHS ${UC_NAMES} ${GZ_NAMES} ${BR_NAMES} )
list(TRANSFORM GZBR_PATHS PREPEND "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/")

# 2. Create full paths for the .c files generated by Python script from Vite output
set(C_PATHS ${GZBR_PATHS})
list(TRANSFORM C_PATHS APPEND ".c")


if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_EARLY_EXPANSION)
# 1. Watch all your source files recursively
file(GLOB_RECURSE WEB_SOURCES
     CONFIGURE_DEPENDS 
     "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/njs/src/*" njs/vite.config.mjs njs/svelte.config.mjs njs/package.json
)
add_custom_command(
    OUTPUT ${GZBR_PATHS}
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E env "BUILD_DIR=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}" npm run build
    DEPENDS ${WEB_SOURCES} #"${COMPONENT_DIR}/force.h" 
    WORKING_DIRECTORY "${COMPONENT_DIR}/njs" # Where your package.json is
    COMMENT "Running Vite build..."
    VERBATIM
)
add_custom_command(
    OUTPUT ${C_PATHS}
    COMMAND python "${COMPONENT_DIR}/tools/file_2_c.py" ${GZBR_PATHS} -o "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}"
    DEPENDS ${GZBR_PATHS} "${COMPONENT_DIR}/tools/file_2_c.py"
    COMMENT "Converting .gz files to .c arrays..."
    VERBATIM
)
endif()

if(ESP_PLATFORM) 
 idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${C_PATHS}
)
else()
    # build static library containing vite bundles in different formats (uncompressed, .gz, .br)
    add_library(webapp_lib STATIC ${C_PATHS})
    add_custom_target(webapp_gen_target DEPENDS ${C_PATHS})
    add_dependencies(webapp_lib webapp_gen_target)
endif()
